description: Always-loaded policy for the shared knowledge base: retrieve relevant canonical knowledge before non-trivial work and cite it, capture worthwhile or generalizable non-trivial knowledge afterward, use memory sparingly for tiny always-true project facts, and treat every capture as a draft pending human review rather than canonical knowledge. The `kb` CLI command mechanics live in the knowledge-base skill.

files.description: Concise always-loaded policy: retrieve-first and cite, capture what generalizes, memory sparingly for always-true facts, drafts are not canonical; commands live in the knowledge-base skill
